name: Maple Applesauce
recipeIngredient: 6 cups (6 medium) sliced peeled cooking apples
2 tablespoons Hungry Jack pancake and waffle syrup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, combine the sliced apples, water, and cinnamon sticks.
2. Bring to a boil over high heat.
3. Reduce heat to low; cover and cook for 15-20 minutes or until apples are tender.
4. Remove cinnamon sticks; stir in syrup.
5. Serve over potato pancakes or pancakes. Makes 6 1/2 servings.
Source: Pilsbury Holiday Cookbook
